subcodes.first_line: The outpourings of God’s grace and the splendors of His compassion are of two kinds. There is the kind that is transmitted through the Intermediaries of Manifestations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الفیوضات الالهیه و الاشراقات الرحمانیه علی قسمین منها ما هو بوسائط المجالی
subcodes.subjects: @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @Manifestation of God as mediator
